items.title: Hawks, Buddy Hield Agree To Push Back Guarantee Date
items.author: Hoops Rumors
items.body_excerpt: Hawks, Buddy Hield Agree To Push Back Guarantee Date Hoops Rumors Gueye option picked up, Hield guarantee date pushed back Peachtree Hoops Per source, the new guarantee date for Buddy Hield is … Yahoo Sports Buddy Hield, Hawks Push Back Guarantee Date On $9.7M Contract RealGM Bud

items.title: Per source, the new guarantee date for Buddy Hield is June 28th.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Per source, the new guarantee date for Buddy Hield is June 28th.

Hield and the Hawks mutually agreed to move it back yesterday from the original date of June 25th.

(Reminder: Hield is already owed $3 million guaranteed on his ~$9.6 million deal for 2026-27)

items.title: Barring an amendment to push the deadline back, Buddy Hield's contract with the Atlanta Hawks will become fully guaranteed at $9.6M if he's not waived today.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Barring an amendment to push the deadline back, Buddy Hield's contract with the Atlanta Hawks will become fully guaranteed at $9.6M if he's not waived today.

Hield's deal is already partially guaranteed for $3M.

items.title: Buddy Hield’s contract will guarantee at the end of tonight if he’s still on the Hawks roster.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Buddy Hield’s contract will guarantee at the end of tonight if he’s still on the Hawks roster.

I’ll be surprised if he’s not either traded or waived by then.

items.title: 11th pick Yaxel Lendeborg is 23 years old, and will be 24 by the start of the NBA season. 18 players 23 years or older have been selected in the top 20 picks since 2000, 11 of which were in the lottery, and the best of them is Cam Johnson or Buddy Hield
